description_long: This is a pair of high-top athletic sneakers featuring a dominant burnt orange synthetic or leather upper with black and pink accent details. The shoes have a robust, padded collar and tongue for ankle support, with a black angular overlay running along the sides and a white midsole that wraps around the base. The lacing system is standard criss-cross with dark gray laces threaded through pink eyelets, adding a pop of color. The heel and collar area are reinforced with white and black panels, while the interior lining appears to be dark, possibly black or green. The outsole is thick and white, designed for urban wear, and the overall construction suggests durability and comfort for everyday use.
description: A pair of high-top burnt orange sneakers with black, pink, and white accents, featuring a padded collar and standard criss-cross lacing. The shoes have a thick white sole and angular black overlays for a sporty, urban look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the padded tongue, pink eyelets, and the full lacing system with the shoes slightly angled inward.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the angular black overlay, white midsole, and the layered construction of the upper.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the reinforced heel, white and black collar, and the back seam details.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, emphasizing the black overlay, white midsole, and the overall high-top silhouette.
